wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 131 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 131 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ حُقُوقَ الشَّيْخِ فِي كُلِّ آنٍ وَبِذَلِكَ تَنَالُ مَحَبَّةَ الشَّيْخِ وَالْأُمَّةِ. [132]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 132 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 132 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 132 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَلَا تُفْشِ أَسْرَارَ الطَّرِيقَةِ لِلْمَلَأِ لِتَكُونَ صَالِحًا مُقَرَّبًا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ. [133]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 133 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 133 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 133 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَسِرْ فِي الطَّرِيقِ بِالصِّدْقِ وَالتَّقْوَى فَإِنَّ الطَّرِيقَ يَقُومُ عَلَى الصِّدْقِ تَمَاماً. [134]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 134 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 134 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
